name: Sarah T.
text: My 8-year-old loves the classes! The instructors are patient, and the platform makes it so easy for kids to learn at their own pace. Highly recommended.

name: Jason M.
text: We were unsure where to start, but the evaluation quiz put my son in the perfect beginner program. He's building a calculator in Python now!

name: Emma L.
text: The teachers make coding fun, not like regular homework. I've already made 3 games by myself.

name: David W.
text: The custom learning plan was exactly what my daughter needed. She used to get frustrated with math, but now she applies logic effortlessly through coding.

name: Priya K.
text: I love the milestone tracking. I get regular updates on exactly what he's building and how his autonomous problem-solving is improving.

name: Michael R.
text: The AI workflows we learned were mind-blowing. I'm building automated scripts for my other homework now!

name: Jenny L.
text: The 1-on-1 pacing is incredible. They really take the time to find out what interests the child and build projects around that.

name: Marcus B.
text: Best class ever. I don't feel like I'm studying. I'm just making cool apps and games.
